generated_assessment.reasoning: The baseline is already aligned with the adversarial goal (-1), so the petition astroturf campaign reinforces existing opposition. The profile's very high neuroticism (88th pct, especially anxiety at 99th and stress vulnerability at 98th) makes threat-salience and systemic-failure framing highly effective, while low openness (17th pct) and low trust (18th pct) amplify elite distrust cues. The T2 campaign over weeks can deepen the stance by about 65 points, moving from -382 to -447, as the confirmatory anecdotes and doubt engineering engage the profile's emotional reactivity without needing personalization.
